use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in landing pages requiring attention-grabbing hover effects
Navigation elements that reveal secondary text on hover for additional context
Interactive buttons in SaaS dashboards where visual feedback enhances user experience
ai_summary: A sleek, minimalist button component featuring a marquee text effect that reveals on hover. Built with Framer Motion for smooth tap animations and fully supports both light and dark modes. The button uses CSS group-based hover states to transition between static and animated text states, making it ideal for interactive UI elements where visual polish and micro-interactions enhance the user experience.
